productDisplayName: Fila Men Hex One Grey Red Shoe
description: CompositionGrey and red running shoes made of PU, nylon mesh upper, padded textile lining, phylon midsole and rubber outsoleshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis pair from fila is the ultimate in comfort for those who love to jog or run. Created with a stylish combination of red and grey, the nylon mesh upper with synthetic panel overlays ensures a snug Fit and superior breathability. The cushioned insole, collar and tongue enhances comfort to the feet. The overall design of the uppers promotes stability, while the lightweight phylon midsole has a greater capacity for shock absorption. The outsole with an aggressive multi-directional pattern enhances grip and stability to protect your feet well while you enjoy a healthy run.
